task_objective: Update GitHub Actions workflows to opt JavaScript actions into Node.js 24 and bump reusable action major versions where upstream tags are available.
design_decisions: Verified available upstream action tags before changing workflow versions.
Added FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 to all workflows to test GitHub's Node 24 action runtime now.
Bumped the workflows to newer action major versions that have upstream tags available.
results: The new workflow regression test failed before implementation.
After workflow changes, the focused test and all release workflow tests passed.
